name: Point-Set Topology — Part 3: Connectedness & Separation
description: Connectedness, path-connectedness, separation axioms (T0–T4), Urysohn's Lemma, Tietze extension.
mermaid:
graph TD
    DefConn["Def: Connected: no separation by two disjoint opens"]
    DefPathConn["Def: Path-connected"]
    ThmPathImplConn["Thm: Path-connected ⇒ connected"]
    ThmContConn["Thm: Continuous image of connected is connected"]
    CorIVT["Cor: Intermediate value theorem"]
    DefT0["Def: T0 (Kolmogorov)"]
    DefT1["Def: T1: points are closed"]
    DefT2["Def: T2 (Hausdorff): distinct points have disjoint nbhds"]
    ThmHausdorffLim["Thm: In Hausdorff, limits are unique"]
    DefNormal["Def: Normal: disjoint closed have disjoint opens"]
    DefRegular["Def: Regular"]
    LemCompactNorm["Lem: Compact Hausdorff ⇒ Normal"]
    ThmUrysohn["Thm: Urysohn: Normal ⇒ Urysohn functions exist"]
    ThmTietze["Thm: Tietze extension: extend continuous from closed"]
    LemConnInter["Lem: Connected iff only ∅ and X are clopen"]
    ThmPathConn["Thm: Path-connected components partition space"]
    DefT0 --> DefT1
    DefT1 --> DefT2
    DefT2 --> ThmHausdorffLim
    DefT2 --> LemCompactNorm
    DefNormal --> ThmUrysohn
    DefNormal --> ThmTietze
    LemCompactNorm --> ThmUrysohn
    ThmUrysohn --> ThmTietze
    DefConn --> ThmContConn
    DefPathConn --> ThmPathImplConn
    DefConn --> LemConnInter
    ThmPathImplConn --> ThmContConn
    ThmContConn --> CorIVT
    DefPathConn --> ThmPathConn
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff,stroke:#9775fa
    classDef lemma fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff,stroke:#4dabf7
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff,stroke:#40c057
    classDef corollary fill:#1abc9c,color:#fff,stroke:#16a085
    class DefConn,DefPathConn,DefT0,DefT1,DefT2,DefNormal,DefRegular definition
    class LemConnInter,LemCompactNorm lemma
    class ThmPathImplConn,ThmContConn,ThmHausdorffLim,ThmUrysohn,ThmTietze,ThmPathConn theorem
    class CorIVT corollary
